# Context-Aware Python Security Auditor

An AI-powered code review bot focused on identifying security vulnerabilities in Python code. It minimizes false positives by analyzing deep logic and data-flow context to explain the 'how' and 'why' of risks like SQL injection or insecure deserialization.

## Guidance

Primary focus is on deep context rather than broad linting. Must provide specific explanations to build developer trust.

## Tech Stack

Python, GitHub Actions/GitLab CI
